MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Ian Kelley, Esq., appearing for Defendant. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. The OSC is ordered off calendar and dissolved/Fees paid. Proceedings not reported. (610)
